title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 221.122 - Repayment for medical care to be term of probation, parole or conditional release
text:
221.122.  Repayment for medical care to be term of probation, parole or conditional release. — All persons placed upon probation, parole or conditional release from any county jail or county correctional facility shall upon request of the authority concerned, as a term of such county probation, parole, or conditional release, repay the county for medicine, dental care, or medical attention as provided in section 221.120.
(L. 1995 H.B. 424 § 6)
